HEADING: Agent Webhooks
INTRO_TEXT: Receive HTTP callbacks when an AI agent takes an action or an approval changes state. All payloads are signed with an HMAC signature matching the comment webhook scheme.
DELETE_CONFIRM: Delete this webhook? This cannot be undone.
ERROR_GENERIC: Something went wrong. Please try again.
FIELD_URL_HELP: HTTPS URL that will receive the POST. The HMAC signature is sent in the X-FastComments-Signature header.
FIELD_DOMAIN_HELP: Agent events are tied to a domain. Use * to receive events from any configured domain.
FIELD_EVENTS_HELP: Select at least one event to subscribe to.
FIELD_AGENTS_HELP: Leave empty to receive events from every agent. Select specific agents to filter.
FIELD_NO_RETRY_STATUS_CODES_HELP: Comma-separated HTTP status codes that should NOT be retried (e.g. 410, 422).
ERROR_URL_INVALID: The URL must start with https:// (or http:// for dev).
TEST_SEND_NO_SECRET: No API secret configured for this webhook's domain.
NOSCRIPT_MESSAGE: JavaScript is required for the test-send button.
